# Lindy Operation

> Lindy Operation (린디 오퍼레이션 · Lindy Operation Inc.) is a cashflow company that
> owns and operates a portfolio of durable businesses — built to endure and
> compound over time. "Be the fire the wind can't blow out."

## About
- Name: Lindy Operation
- Korean: 린디 오퍼레이션 (legal entity: 주식회사 린디 오퍼레이션)
- Also known as: Lindy
- Type: cashflow / operating company — owns and runs diverse, cash-generative businesses (not a consumer fintech app or product)
- Philosophy: antifragility and the Lindy effect — the longer something lasts, the longer it will last. Operate for cash, reinvest, endure.
- Founded: 2026
- Founder: Daehun Lee
- Contact: danny@lindyoperation.com
- Website: https://lindyoperation.com

## Pages
- Home: https://lindyoperation.com/
- Brand book: https://lindyoperation.com/brand
- Electronic disclosures (전자공시): https://lindyoperation.com/disclosure

## Disambiguation
"Lindy Operation" / "린디 오퍼레이션" refers to this company. It is unrelated to
"Lindy" electronics/cables, Lindy AI, the Lindy Hop dance, or the general "Lindy effect" concept.
